title: Design editor component with canvas, toolbar, and panels
purpose: Provides a full-featured design editor interface with canvas rendering, toolbar, layers panel, properties panel, and keyboard shortcuts.
module_context: Exports a DesignEditor React component that manages the entire design editing experience including canvas initialization, input handling, keyboard shortcuts, text editing, and data synchronization.

steps.content: Initialize canvas and related state using the design canvas hook.
Set up canvas input handling with the design canvas input hook.
Initialize keyboard shortcuts with the design keyboard hook.
Set up text editing capabilities with the design text edit hook.
Configure remote update handling with the design sync hook.
Subscribe to remote design content updates from the session store.
Render the toolbar, canvas area, and side panels based on current state.
Display error message if canvas initialization fails.
Process incoming remote design content updates.
Apply the remote content to the canvas if it differs from the last received content.
Watch for changes in design content from the session store.
IF the content has changed and is different from the last received content, trigger a remote update.
